question: Does global warming cause breathing problems?
ground_truth_data_points: 470,000 ozone-related deaths globally in 2023 (HEI State of Global Air 2025)
14,000 COPD deaths in US linked to ozone (one of highest rates among wealthy nations)
2018 Camp Fire: hazardous air 150+ miles away, affecting ~7 million people in SF Bay Area
Ragweed pollen season lengthened significantly in central US/Canada between 1995-2015

sources.name: HEI State of Global Air - Ozone
sources.note: 470K global ozone deaths figure (2023 data, 2025 report)

sources.name: HEI State of Global Air 2024 - Key Findings
sources.note: 14,000 US COPD deaths from ozone figure (2021 data, 2024 report)

sources.name: IPCC AR5 WGII Chapter 11 - Human Health
USGCRP - Impacts of Climate Change on Human Health (2016)
sources.note: Internet Archive mirror — original globalchange.gov taken down

sources.note: Reference resource for What You Can Do section, not primary evidence
